seo.title: Fan Potatoes - side dish for a braai - Marinda Kook

html:
Potatoes are food. Potatoes are a side dish. Potatoes are a staple. Potatoes are always with us. I like to make this potato dish along with a braai. You can boil the potatoes a little beforehand if you're in a hurry.

 

YOU WILL NEED:

  • 6 potatoes
  • 125ml mayonnaise
  • 125ml chutney
  • 60ml onion soup powder
  • 125ml grated cheese
  • olive oil
  • coarse salt
  • rosemary

NOW:

  1. wash the potatoes (I always scrub mine with a scouring pad)
  2. cut the potatoes into slices, but not all the way through
  3. pour olive oil into the bottom of an oven dish and place the potatoes in the dish
  4. mix the mayonnaise, chutney, onion soup and cheese in a bowl
  5. now spoon some of the filling into the potato's slices (use a table knife to get it in deep)
  6. sprinkle olive oil and coarse salt over the potatoes.
  7. place the rosemary sprigs on the potatoes
  8. bake covered with foil for 30 minutes and without foil for another 30 minutes – check with a sharp knife whether they're soft.

These potatoes go well with any meal – and are also lovely cold as a midnight snack.
